name: My Farm Empire
description: My Farm Empire is a fun and relaxing game that lets you create your own farm paradise on a beautiful island. You will become a farmer and grow various crops, from fruits and vegetables to flowers and herbs. You will also enjoy the stunning graphics, the smooth gameplay, and the rewarding progression system that will make you feel like a real farmer. My Farm Empire is more than just a game, it&rsquo;s a lifestyle. Join the My Farm Empire today and start your farming adventure.
tags: Boys, Casual, Collecting, Farm, Food, Fruit, Girls, Kids, Stickman
